allow: Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const arr=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Total jokes:', arr.length\); console.log\('First:', JSON.stringify\(arr[0],null,2\)\)}\)")
Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>console.log\('Total all jokes:', JSON.parse\(d\).length\)\)")
